arts.ttl: Mallorca end 2024 in a good place
arts.sum: – Real Mallorca play their last La Liga game of 2024 away in the south of Madrid against Getafe tomorrow (Saturday) at 2pm. Watching it at normal speed, it’s obvious Muriqi didn’t intend to kick or plant his studs on Gil. Then, lo and behold, minutes later Girona’s Van der Beck carried out the same tackle on Mallorca’s Copete and the referee waved play on.

arts.ttl: Preview: Getafe vs. Mallorca - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Getafe and Mallorca, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
